## Checklist

- [ ] Research / education only — **no** medical, diagnostic, treatment, monitoring, or emergency-use claims.
- [ ] No fabricated regulatory status (FDA / CE / ISO).
- [ ] No PCB layout / Gerbers (still blocked — see `docs/Blockers_Before_PCB_Layout.md`).
- [ ] Unverified electrical values left as **TBD** (not filled with guessed numbers).
- [ ] EDA tool referred to as **flux.ai**; part numbers / reference designators match the netlist.
- [ ] Firmware builds (`pio run`) if firmware changed; docs cross-references resolve.
- [ ] `README.md` structure tree / `docs/README.md` updated if files were added or moved.
